Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment Codebook │ August 2025 │ V 1.7 20 

DEPSN_MEDICARE_EVER 

LABEL: Major Depressive Disorders First Ever Occurrence Date — Medicare Only Claims 

DESCRIPTION: This variable shows the date when the beneficiary first met the criteria for the major depressive 
disorders indicator. The variable will be blank for beneficiaries that have never had the condition. (On 
the CCW
